Participating in Blue Sky at this level will cost $0 per month, in addition to your regular monthly bill.

SIGN UP NOW
Close

Customers on Oregon Rate Schedules 23 or 41 are considered small businesses.

Close

Blue Sky® Block allows you to support renewable energy equal to any portion of your energy use. A block represents a set amount of renewable energy – specifically, 100 kilowatt-hours (kWh) of renewable energy. Each block costs $1.95 per month. Charges for Blue Sky Block remain constant each month and do not fluctuate with your electricity usage. Blue Sky Block purchases support wind (50%) and solar (50%) energy from the West and help develop community-based small-scale renewable energy projects. Also see PacificPower.net/BlueSkyPCL.

Close

Your kilowatt-hour usage can be found on your bill or by logging into your online account.

Close

Blue Sky® Usage is ideal for customers who want to support renewable energy equal to 100% of their monthly energy use. Blue Sky Usage costs about a penny ($0.013) more per kilowatt-hour. Blue Sky Usage supports a blend of renewable resources from Oregon and the West. The resource mix is likely to include wind (50%) and solar (50%). Also see PacificPower.net/BlueSkyPCL.

For residential customers, the average home uses about 838 kilowatt-hours of electricity per month. Your kilowatt-hour usage can be found on your bill or by logging into your online account.

Close
Close

Blue Sky® Block allows you to support renewable energy equal to any portion of your energy use. A block represents a set amount of renewable energy – specifically, 100 kilowatt-hours (kWh) of renewable energy. Each block costs $1.95 a month. Charges for Blue Sky Block remain constant each month and do not fluctuate with your electricity usage. Blue Sky Block purchases support wind (50%) and solar (50%) energy from the West and help develop community-based small-scale renewable energy projects.

Close

Our business partnership program levels have changed. For more information about the Blue Sky program, please email bluesky@pacificorp.com.

Close

Blue Sky® Habitat is ideal for customers who want to support renewable energy equal to 100% of their monthly energy use AND who want to make a contribution of $2.50 a month to help restore and preserve native fish habitats in Oregon via the nonprofit organization  The Freshwater Trust. Blue Sky Habitat costs about a penny ($0.013) more per kilowatt-hour, PLUS an additional $2.50 each month. Blue Sky Habitat supports a blend of renewable resources from Oregon and the Western region. The resource mix is likely to include wind (30%) and solar (70%). In addition, your fixed monthly $2.50 Blue Sky Habitat donation helps restore and preserve native habitat in Oregon through The Freshwater Trust. Also see PacificPower.net/BlueSkyPCL.

  •  
  • START OVER

The block size used in this calculator is 100 kilowatt-hours. For more information about the Blue Sky Price, Terms, and Conditions visit PacificPower.net/BlueSkyPCL.

Your participation in the Blue Sky® program helps to reduce the carbon footprint associated with your electricity use. Carbon footprint reduction based on eGRID's 2023 total output emissions data for the NWPP subregion (please see U.S. EPA eGRID data).

One LED light bulb consumes 11.0 kilowatt-hours of electricity per year when used for 3 hours per day (EnergySage, 2024). 

Electric vehicles use on average 41.42 kilowatt-hours per 100 miles (DOE Fuel Economy Guide [PDF], 2025).
